nasb.text: Saul was staying in the outskirts of Gibeah under the pomegranate tree which is in Migron. And the people who were with him were about six hundred men,

esv.text: Saul was staying in the outskirts of Gibeah in the pomegranate cave at Migron. The people who were with him were about six hundred men,

cnv.text: 那時掃羅在基比亞的邊界，坐在米磯崙的石榴樹下，跟隨他的約有六百人。

ccb.text: 那时扫罗正待在基比亚边界米矶仑的石榴树下，跟随他的大约有六百人，
